events.bid_type_inference_note: classified formal per §G1 process-position fallback: bid submitted in direct response to Final Round Ann on 2013-09-11 (BidderID=21) which invited binding proposals by 2013-09-18 and required merger-agreement markup; matches the announcing-phase formal default per §C1 final-round vocabulary.
events.source_quote: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share.
